promotions.title: First remittance to Chinese Mainland: 0 Fees
promotions.highlight: 💸 Zero handling fee on your first transfer to Chinese Mainland
promotions.description: Customers can enjoy 0 handling fee on their first transfer to Chinese Mainland using 'Remit to Chinese Mainland·WeRemit' via the Airstar Bank App. Transfers can be received as soon as 1 hour. This is a one-time offer per customer.
promotions.period: During the promotion period (dates not specified)
promotions.quota: One-time offer per customer. Limited quota, first come, first served.

promotions.title: Activate Money Safe, Get a Pacific Coffee Voucher
promotions.highlight: ☕ Free HKD30 Pacific Coffee e-Cash Voucher
promotions.description: Deposit any amount into a 'Money Safe' account and receive a HKD30 Pacific Coffee e-Cash Voucher. The Money Safe is an anti-fraud feature introduced by the HKMA that offers stronger protection while earning the same Savings/Time Deposit interest rates.
promotions.quota: Limited quota, first come, first served

promotions.title: Visa Flight Cash Rebate Promotion
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Up to $800 cash rebate on flight bookings
promotions.description: Visa cardholders can enjoy up to $800 cash rebate when using their Registered Eligible Visa Card to pay for air tickets with selected airlines. Eligible airlines include Air New Zealand, ANA, Ethiopian Airlines, EVA AIR and Singapore Airlines via their designated official Hong Kong or Macau websites.
promotions.cost: Minimum spend of HKD/MOP 4,000 for $240 rebate or HKD/MOP 8,000+ for $800 rebate

promotions.title: Bank Securities Transfer 24/7 Service
promotions.highlight: 🏦 24/7 instant securities transfer in multiple currencies
promotions.description: Transfer bank securities instantly with 24/7 availability. The service supports multiple currencies including HKD, USD, and CNY with instant arrival of funds.

promotions.title: Hong Kong & US Stocks Trading
promotions.highlight: 📈 Low-fee stock trading with fractional shares option
promotions.description: Trade Hong Kong and US stocks instantly with low fees, fractional shares options, and global access. The service offers seamless trading through the Airstar Bank platform.

promotions.title: Pay Shield 24/7 Fraud Protection
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ 24/7 real-time payment fraud protection
promotions.description: Airstar Bank Visa Platinum Card offers Pay Shield, a 24/7 real-time fraud protection service. The feature provides enhanced security for card transactions at all times.
promotions.quota: Available for all Visa Platinum cardholders

promotions.title: Mobile Account Opening in 5 Minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account via mobile in as fast as 5 minutes
promotions.description: Open an Airstar Bank account via mobile phone in as fast as 5 minutes. The service supports both Hong Kong residents and visitors who are physically present in Hong Kong at the time of account opening.

promotions.title: No Account Management Fees
promotions.highlight: 💰 Zero account management fees and no minimum deposit
promotions.description: Enjoy free banking services with no account management fees and no minimum deposit balance requirement. This applies to all Airstar Bank accounts.

promotions.title: Personal Loan with Personalized Stellar APR
promotions.highlight: 💼 Personal loans with customized APR from 7.43% to 35.05%
promotions.description: Apply for a personal loan with a customized APR ranging from 7.43% to 35.05%. Total loan amount up to 12 times of monthly salary or HKD1,000,000 (whichever is lower). From application to loan disbursement, complete in as fast as 5 minutes.
promotions.cost: Interest charges apply based on personalized APR

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account
promotions.highlight: 🌐 No minimum balance savings with multi-currency support
promotions.description: Open a savings account with no minimum balance requirement and multi-currency capabilities. The account allows for flexible management of funds across different currencies.

promotions.title: Flexible Time Deposit
promotions.highlight: ⏳ 24/7 time deposit placement with flexible tenors
promotions.description: Place time deposits with flexible tenors at any time with 24/7 availability. The service offers convenient term deposit options to maximize interest earnings.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Transfers
promotions.highlight: ↗️ 24/7 instant transfers in multiple currencies
promotions.description: Transfer funds in multiple currencies (HKD, USD, CNY, etc.) via mobile numbers, email addresses, or account numbers. Enjoy 24/7 Instant Transfers for HKD and CNY via FPS.

promotions.title: eM+ High Yield Account (Libra Savings) Interest Rate Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to 2.0% p.a. on your HKD deposits!
promotions.description: Customers who successfully upgrade to eM+ High Yield Account (Libra Savings) through the AlipayHK App can enjoy up to 2.0% p.a. interest rate. The 2.0% p.a. interest rate is applicable to deposit amounts between HKD 200,000 - 800,000, while deposits up to HKD 200,000 earn 0.5% p.a.
promotions.quota: Available to all customers who upgrade through AlipayHK App
promotions.cost: Minimum deposit of HKD 200,000 for highest rate

promotions.title: SME Loan Cash Rebate Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💵 Get up to HKD 100,000 cash rebate on first drawdown!
promotions.description: Small and medium enterprises can enjoy a cash rebate of up to HKD 100,000 when they first draw down on their business loan from Ant Bank. This is a limited-time promotion to support local businesses with their financing needs.
promotions.quota: Available to SMEs who qualify for business loans
promotions.cost: Must take out a business loan and complete first drawdown

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account Upgrade
promotions.highlight: 🌏 Multi-currency support for HKD, RMB, and USD!
promotions.description: Ant Bank's savings account has been upgraded to support multiple currencies including Hong Kong Dollars, Renminbi, and US Dollars. Users can also transfer directly from Libra Savings to third-party accounts with increased daily transfer limits of up to HKD 1 million.

promotions.title: Ant Bank Investment Fund Platform Zero Fees
promotions.highlight: 💸 $0 subscription and redemption fees for all funds!
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched a new investment fund platform with zero platform fees. For a limited time, customers can enjoy subscription fees starting from 0% and completely free redemption fees on all funds. The platform offers funds from top global fund companies with investments starting from as low as HKD $1.

promotions.title: Insurance Product with 3.6% Annual Rate
promotions.highlight: 📈 Up to 3.6% annual rate on insurance products!
promotions.description: Ant Bank is offering insurance products with returns of up to 3.6% annual rate. These products are distributed by Ant Bank as an agent for YF Life Insurance International Ltd. and are designed for Hong Kong residents seeking insurance coverage with competitive returns.
promotions.quota: Available to eligible Hong Kong residents

promotions.title: Securities Trading Commission-Free Promotion
promotions.highlight: 🔥 Zero commission trading for Hong Kong and US stocks!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers a one-stop trading platform for Hong Kong and US stock markets with commission-free trading. This promotion allows customers to trade stocks without paying any commission fees, providing cost-effective access to global investment opportunities.

promotions.title: Fixed Deposit No Penalty for Early Withdrawal
promotions.highlight: 🔓 No penalty interest for early withdrawal of fixed deposits!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers fixed deposits with zero penalty interest for early withdrawals. Customers can enjoy the benefits of fixed deposit interest rates while maintaining the flexibility to withdraw the entire deposit amount ahead of maturity without incurring any penalty charges.

promotions.title: Open an Account in 5 Minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account in just 5 minutes with HKID and mobile number
promotions.description: Fusion Bank offers a simplified account opening process that takes only 5 minutes with just your HKID card and mobile number. The entire process can be completed faster than preparing a cup of coffee, making banking more convenient and accessible.
promotions.quota: Hong Kong identity card holders aged 18 or above, non-US persons only

promotions.title: Start Saving from HKD 1
promotions.highlight: 💰 Begin saving with as little as HKD 1
promotions.description: Fusion Bank allows customers to start saving with as little as HKD 1. This flexible savings plan enables users to save for their next adventure or personal milestone with no minimum balance requirement.

promotions.title: Local Transfers in Multiple Currencies
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Send local transfers in HKD, CNY and USD instantly
promotions.description: Fusion Bank offers local transfers in multiple currencies including HKD, CNY, and USD. Users can exchange, spend, and transfer money locally in these currencies anytime and from anywhere, with all funds securely accessible through their mobile device.

promotions.title: Global Remittance Service
promotions.highlight: 🌎 Send money globally from your smartphone with real-time exchange rates
promotions.description: Fusion Bank's remittance service allows customers to send money globally directly from their smartphone. Users can buy foreign currency at real-time exchange rates and send it internationally or connect to payment networks for cashless spending everywhere.

promotions.title: Deposit Protection up to HKD 800,000
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Deposits protected up to HKD 800,000 under Hong Kong's Deposit Protection Scheme
promotions.description: Fusion Bank is a member of Hong Kong's Deposit Protection Scheme which protects eligible deposits up to a maximum of HKD 800,000. This provides customers with security and peace of mind when banking with Fusion Bank.

promotions.title: Foreign Exchange Rewards Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💱 Special rewards for foreign currency exchange transactions
promotions.description: Fusion Bank offers special rewards for customers who exchange currencies. This promotion includes benefits for exchanging to HKD, USD, or RMB with no upper limit on the exchange amount.

promotions.title: Foreign Exchange Time Deposit Bonus Interest
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Bonus interest rates on foreign currency time deposits
promotions.description: Customers can enjoy additional interest on time deposits when exchanging currencies with Fusion Bank. This regular promotion offers preferential interest rates for foreign currency time deposits with no upper limit on deposit amounts.
promotions.cost: Currency exchange and time deposit required

promotions.title: Flash Monday High-Interest HKD Time Deposit
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Special high-interest rates for HKD time deposits on Mondays
promotions.description: Fusion Bank offers a 'Flash Monday' promotion with higher interest rates for HKD time deposits. This special rate is available on Mondays for customers looking to maximize their savings returns.

promotions.title: Savings Interest Plus
promotions.highlight: 📈 Enhanced interest rates on savings accounts
promotions.description: Fusion Bank offers enhanced interest rates on savings accounts through their 'Savings Interest Plus' promotion. This offer allows customers to earn more on their savings compared to standard rates.

promotions.title: Pay your tax with Mox Credit Card, split and earn cash reward
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to HKD500 cash reward when paying tax bills with Mox Credit
promotions.description: Pay your tax bill with Mox Credit Card and apply for Instalment during the promotional period. Spread your tax payment while earning up to HKD500 in cash rewards to ease the financial pressure of tax season.

promotions.title: Tax Season Instant Loan with Low APR
promotions.highlight: 💸 APR as low as 1.18% for Tax Season Instant Loan
promotions.description: Apply for a Tax Season Instant Loan with APR as low as 1.18%. Get instant cash disbursement through the Mox app with a personalized quotation process.

promotions.title: Keeta Exclusive Flash Sale
promotions.highlight: ⚡️ Up to HKD80 off orders on Keeta with Mox Card
promotions.description: Order on Keeta with your Mox Card and enjoy a Mox exclusive discount of up to HKD20 off per order, saving up to HKD80 for the whole month. Plus, grab surprise vouchers and welcome rewards for your home party.

promotions.title: Xiaomi Flagship Phone Cash Rewards
promotions.highlight: 📷 Up to 7% total cash rewards at Xiaomi + 0% Instalments
promotions.description: Shop at mi.com or any Xiaomi Store with your Mox Credit Card to earn up to 5% extra cash rebate (capped at HKD450) plus up to 12-month 0% interest instalments. Combined with standard up to 2% Unlimited CashBack for a total of up to 7% cash rewards.
promotions.quota: New customers get up to HKD2,150 cash bonus

promotions.title: Mox Journey from Scratch Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💥 Complete missions to scratch & win rewards worth up to HKD8,888
promotions.description: Take on any of five simple challenges to get a Mox Scratch Card with instant prizes. Complete more missions to multiply chances of winning the top prize of HKD8,888 (HKD8,000 SOL(s) (Solana) + HKD888 cash reward).

promotions.title: Indulge and Grow Bonus Deposit Promotion
promotions.highlight: 🍽 Chance to win a 1-month free lunch when depositing your bonus
promotions.description: Deposit your bonus into Mox to earn interest and get a chance to win a 1-month free lunch. For every HKD10,000 deposited, receive one entry into the lucky draw, increasing your chances of winning with higher deposits.
promotions.cost: Minimum deposit of HKD10,000 for one entry

promotions.title: Mox x csl Best-in-Town Exclusive Plan Offer
promotions.highlight: 🤳 Get up to HKD1,380 rebates on new sign-ups or renewals + free NowTV Pass
promotions.description: Sign up for a new plan or renew your existing one with csl using Mox Credit Card autopay. Automatically receive an HKD180 monthly fee rebate plus a free Now TV beIN SPORTS Super Pack 1-Month Pass valued at HKD188.
promotions.cost: csl plan sign-up or renewal with Mox Credit autopay

promotions.title: Travel Pick & Go Free Add-on Coverage
promotions.highlight: ✈️ FREE add-on coverage with Travel Pick & Go insurance
promotions.description: Apply for Travel Pick & Go insurance during the promotion period to receive 1 FREE add-on coverage. This offer helps safeguard your trip from the financial stress that unexpected events can bring.
promotions.cost: Travel Pick & Go insurance purchase required

promotions.title: MOXTRAVEL Asia Miles Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Earn up to 28,500 Asia Miles through spending and saving
promotions.description: New customers who enter invitation code 'MOXTRAVEL' to open a Mox account and apply for a Mox Credit Card can earn up to 28,500 miles through spending and saving — enough for a round-trip flight to Asia.

promotions.title: Samsung S26 Series Exclusive Offer at The Club
promotions.highlight: 📱 HKD100 off Samsung S26 series at The Club with promo code
promotions.description: Spend HKD1,800 or more on The Club with your Mox Credit Card and enter promo code CLUBMOX2026 to enjoy an instant HKD100 discount. This offer applies to the new Samsung S26 series and is in addition to the standard up to 2% Unlimited CashBack.

promotions.title: Uber Taxi Ride Offer
promotions.highlight: 🚕 Up to HKD90 off Uber Taxi rides
promotions.description: Pay with your Mox Card and enjoy HKD10 off each Uber Taxi ride per month. The offer applies whether you're visiting family, heading out for the weekend, or catching a flight, allowing you to travel more and save more this season.

promotions.title: MOXDEPO Time Deposit Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 💵 Earn HKD2,500 cash rewards with HKD250,000 Time Deposit
promotions.description: Open a Mox Account using the invitation code 'MOXDEPO', complete account opening within 15 days, place a Time Deposit of at least HKD250,000 within 7 days, and maintain the balance until the end of the Hold Fund Period to earn HKD2,500 cash rewards.
promotions.quota: Only for customers who haven't held any Mox Account in the past 12 months

promotions.title: 1500MOX New Customer Cash Reward
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to HKD1,500 cash reward plus 2% Unlimited CashBack
promotions.description: New customers who use invitation code '1500MOX' to open a Mox account and apply for a Mox Credit Card can earn up to HKD1,500 in cash rewards by meeting spending requirements at any merchant in Hong Kong. Plus, unlock 2% Unlimited CashBack or HKD4=1 mile with no balance requirement.

promotions.title: MOXSMART Double Rewards Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 🛍 20% cash rebate on 5 hot merchants plus 12% p.a. welcome savings rate
promotions.description: New Mox customers who enter invitation code 'MOXSMART' when signing up can enjoy a full year of 20% CashBack on HKTVmall, foodpanda, Uber, Keeta, or Taobao, PLUS standard up to 2% Unlimited CashBack on all spending. Also earn a total welcome savings rate of 12% p.a. from deposit.

promotions.title: MOXBILL26 HKT Bill Payment Offer
promotions.highlight: 💸 Up to HKD1,200 cash rewards + up to 2% CashBack for HKT bill payments
promotions.description: Open a Mox Account with invitation code MOXBILL26, apply for a Mox Credit Card, and pay HKT bills to unlock cash rewards worth up to HKD1,200. Also earn up to 2% CashBack on bill payments with Mox Credit Card.
promotions.quota: Limited quota, first come, first served

promotions.title: Trip.com Exclusive Discount
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Up to 8% Off + Up to 2% Unlimited CashBack at Trip.com
promotions.description: Use your Mox Card to book hotels or flights on Trip.com and enjoy up to 8% exclusive discounts. Spend with Mox Credit Card to earn up to an additional 2% Unlimited CashBack, making every trip more rewarding throughout the year.

promotions.title: Personal Accident Cushion Double Reward
promotions.highlight: ⚡️ Up to 2 months premium rebate with Personal Accident Cushion
promotions.description: Apply for Personal Accident Cushion insurance to receive up to 2 months' premium rebate. Double rebate of HKD120 for Value Plan or HKD200 for Max Plan, offering enhanced protection for you and your family.
promotions.quota: Limited to first 3,000 eligible purchases and customers who have not previously enjoyed rebate from Personal Accident Cushion
promotions.cost: Personal Accident Cushion insurance purchase required

promotions.title: Mox Payroll Benefits
promotions.highlight: 💸 1.5% p.a. bonus rate + 2% CashBack when setting up payroll
promotions.description: Switch your payroll to Mox to unlock a 1.5% p.a. bonus rate on your HKD/USD Savings Account. Additionally enjoy unlimited 2% CashBack or HKD4=1 Asia Miles on your Mox Credit Card spending.
promotions.quota: Available to all customers setting up payroll with Mox

promotions.title: Mission Bonus Rate
promotions.highlight: 🚀 Stack missions to earn up to 3.5% p.a. on deposits
promotions.description: Complete 4 easy missions – route payroll, invest, FX, or boost daily balance – to earn up to 3.5% p.a. on eligible HKD or USD Savings Deposits. Stack any or all missions, with bonus rates applied instantly and lasting until the end of the month.

promotions.title: Mox Referral Programme
promotions.highlight: 🎉 HKD300 cash reward for both referrer and referee
promotions.description: Share your referral code to invite friends to open a Mox account. Both you and your friend will earn HKD300 cash reward when they complete account opening within 15 days and make eligible transactions. There's no limit to how many people you can refer.
promotions.quota: No limit on number of referrals
promotions.cost: Referee must complete HKD1,000 qualifying spend on Mox Credit within 30 days of approval

promotions.title: CLUBLINK Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Rewards worth up to HKD1,400 when linking to The Club
promotions.description: New customers can open a Mox Account with code 'CLUBLINK', link their Mox Card to The Club account, and apply for a Mox Credit Card to earn rewards worth up to HKD1,400.
promotions.quota: Limited quota, first come, first served
promotions.cost: Mox account opening and linking to The Club required

promotions.title: Mox Zone on The Club
promotions.highlight: 🛍️ Exclusive year-round discounts on 100+ popular gadgets
promotions.description: Mox Zone is now available on The Club, offering Mox customers exclusive year-round discounts on over 100 popular gadgets. Plus, enjoy free delivery on orders of HKD400 or more.
promotions.quota: Limited quota, first come, first served

promotions.title: Mox Asia Miles Time Deposit
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Earn Asia Miles through Time Deposits for travel
promotions.description: Set up a Mox Time Deposit to earn Asia Miles for travel. For example, a 12-month Asia Miles Time Deposit of HKD104,000 in new funds will earn 26,000 Asia Miles, enough for a round-trip flight to destinations like Tokyo or Osaka.

promotions.title: FlexiBoost Savings
promotions.highlight: 💰 Stable interest rates with progressive growth
promotions.description: FlexiBoost offers stable interest rates that won't change regardless of market conditions. Earn progressively higher interest rates as your wealth grows with this flexible savings solution.

promotions.title: New FX User Rewards
promotions.highlight: 💱 Up to HKD175 cash rewards for new FX users
promotions.description: Try Mox FX for trading foreign currencies, making investments, or sending money overseas to earn up to HKD175 in cash rewards. Perfect for first-time FX users with Mox.

promotions.title: Mox Credit Card Miles Rewards Scheme
promotions.highlight: ✈️ HKD4=1 Asia Mile on all spending + 0% FX Fees
promotions.description: Earn an unbeatable HKD4=1 Asia Mile on all spending with Mox Credit Card's Miles Rewards Scheme. Enjoy 0% FX Fees on foreign transactions and the flexibility to switch between CashBack and Asia Miles rewards at any time.
promotions.quota: Available to all Mox Credit Card holders

promotions.title: Unlimited CashBack with Mox Credit Card
promotions.highlight: 💳 Up to 2% Unlimited CashBack with no cap or category limits
promotions.description: When spending with Mox Credit, earn up to 2% Unlimited CashBack that's calculated instantly and credited daily to your Mox Account. There are no caps or category limits, and it's real cash you can use immediately.

promotions.title: MOXHKT25 HKT Shopping Rewards
promotions.highlight: 🛍️ Up to HKD1,400 in rewards when shopping at HKT
promotions.description: Open a Mox Account using code 'MOXHKT25', link your Mox Card, and apply for Mox Credit Card to instantly receive 2,000 Clubpoints. Earn additional cash rewards up to HKD1,000 by spending HKD1,000 in one transaction at csl shop/1O1O Center/csl eshop or subscribing to HKT services.
promotions.quota: Limited quota, first come, first served
promotions.cost: Minimum HKD1,000 spending at HKT merchants required for full rewards

promotions.title: Instant Interest on Time Deposits
promotions.highlight: ⏱ Instant rewards for Time Deposit in cash or Asia Miles
promotions.description: Mox gives you rewards for your Time Deposit instantly, right at the moment you place it. Choose between cash or Asia Miles rewards immediately upon placing your Time Deposit.

promotions.title: 0% Interest Instant Clear
promotions.highlight: 💳 0% interest* on Instant Clear for credit card balance transfers
promotions.description: Clear your external credit card bills from other banks or financial institutions with Instant Clear and save as much as 94% interest charges. The process takes only a few minutes and offers 0% interest options.

promotions.title: Year-round offers with Mox Credit Card
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Exclusive offers with Unlimited CashBack or Miles
promotions.description: Enjoy fabulous year-round offers when using your Mox Credit Card at partner merchants. Earn Unlimited CashBack or Unlimited Miles on all your spending throughout the year.
promotions.quota: Available to all Mox Credit Card holders

promotions.title: Daily Interest Calculation
promotions.highlight: 💸 Interest on savings calculated and credited to your account daily
promotions.description: Mox calculates and credits interest to your Mox Account daily, allowing your savings to grow faster. This is a permanent feature of Mox accounts with no end date or special eligibility requirements.

promotions.title: Mox Invest Trading Services
promotions.highlight: 📈 Trade HK and US stocks including fractional shares with low fees
promotions.description: Mox is the first digital bank allowing customers to trade in both HK and US stocks, including fractional shares. Invest with low fees in stocks and funds with the security and advantages of a bank.

promotions.title: USD Savings Rate
promotions.highlight: 💵 1% p.a. interest on USD savings with no strings attached
promotions.description: Starting 1 March 2025, enjoy 1% p.a. interest on your USD savings with no strings attached. Interest is calculated and credited to your account daily, allowing you to watch your savings grow every day.

promotions.title: Mox Credit FPS Payments
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Pay with Mox Credit via FPS for transfers and bill payments
promotions.description: Use your Mox Credit to make payments via FPS, making daily transfers or paying bills effortlessly. This feature is automatically unlocked when your credit limit is approved, with no extra documents required.

promotions.title: Account Opening in 3 Minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account in as fast as 3 minutes
promotions.description: Customers can open a Ping An Digital Bank account in as little as 3 minutes. This applies to standard cases where no additional information or documents are required, though actual account opening time may vary depending on individual circumstances.

promotions.title: No Minimum Balance Requirement
promotions.highlight: 💰 Maintain your account with no minimum balance
promotions.description: Ping An Digital Bank accounts come with no minimum balance requirement. Customers can maintain their accounts without worrying about minimum balance fees or penalties.

promotions.title: 24×7 Full Banking Capability
promotions.highlight: 🕒 Access banking services anytime, day or night
promotions.description: Ping An Digital Bank provides round-the-clock banking services through its mobile application. Customers can perform banking transactions and access services 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

promotions.title: Banking Services for Visitors in Hong Kong
promotions.highlight: 🌏 Banking services for both residents and visitors
promotions.description: Ping An Digital Bank provides banking services for both Hong Kong residents and visitors to Hong Kong. Banking services are only available to visiting customers who are physically present in Hong Kong.
promotions.quota: Available to Hong Kong residents and visitors

promotions.title: Money Market Funds with 0 Transaction Fees
promotions.highlight: 💲 0 transaction fees for money market funds
promotions.description: Ping An Digital Bank offers money market funds with no subscription or redemption fees. Redemption can be processed as quickly as same day, with funds available in your account immediately.
promotions.cost: Minimum subscription amount of USD 20 or HKD 100

promotions.title: Hong Kong Stocks Trading with 0 Platform Fee
promotions.highlight: 📈 Trade Hong Kong stocks with 0 platform fee
promotions.description: Ping An Digital Bank offers Hong Kong stock trading with no platform fees. Commission is 0.15% with a minimum charge of HKD 50 per transaction.

promotions.title: US Stocks 16-Hour Trading
promotions.highlight: 🌎 Trade US stocks during a 16-hour window
promotions.description: Ping An Digital Bank provides extended US stock trading hours up to 16 hours daily. This includes pre-market, regular market, and after-hours trading sessions, offering greater flexibility for investors.
promotions.cost: USD 0.012 per share with minimum USD 7.88 per transaction

promotions.title: Free Real-time Level 1 Stock Quotes
promotions.highlight: 📊 Access free real-time Level 1 stock quotes
promotions.description: Ping An Digital Bank provides free real-time Level 1 market data for stocks. Customers can access unlimited real-time quotes 24 hours a day to help them make informed investment decisions.
promotions.quota: Available to all customers with investment accounts

promotions.title: Discounted Fund Subscription Fees
promotions.highlight: 💸 Lower fees for fund investments
promotions.description: Ping An Digital Bank offers competitive fund subscription fees: free for money market funds, 0.5% for bond funds, and 1% for mixed and equity funds.

promotions.title: WeLab Global Wallet Best Exchange Rates
promotions.highlight: 💱 Enjoy the best FX rates in town for international transactions
promotions.description: WeLab Bank offers the best exchange rates in Hong Kong compared to 28 retail banks. The comparison is based on rates collected from bank websites and mobile banking platforms, excluding special promotions or preferential rates.

promotions.title: WeLab Global Wallet $0 Foreign Currency Transaction Fee
promotions.highlight: 💳 $0 foreign currency transaction fee for overseas spending
promotions.description: Use WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card for foreign transactions with no foreign currency transaction fees when using any of the 10 supported currencies. Includes JPY, USD, CNY, AUD, GBP, EUR, SGD, CAD, CHF, and NZD.

promotions.title: Easter Lucky Draw Campaign
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Win travel vouchers worth HKD1,000 among 300 prizes
promotions.description: Participate in the Easter Lucky Draw by performing foreign currency exchange and making overseas spending with WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card. 300 prizes including HKD1,000 travel vouchers are available to win.

promotions.title: Up to 3% Overseas Spending Cashback
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to 3% cashback on overseas spending
promotions.description: Enjoy up to 0.2% cashback on local spending and up to 3% cashback on overseas spending with WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card. Cashback will be credited to core account by May 31, 2026.

promotions.title: WeLab Bank 2-in-1 Welcome Rewards
promotions.highlight: 💰 New customers enjoy up to HKD5,000 cash rewards
promotions.description: New customers can enjoy dual welcome offers with promo code 'WL5000': up to 4% p.a. time deposit interest rate plus HKD4,000 investment fund cash reward, totaling approximately HKD5,000 in rewards.
promotions.cost: Free with minimum deposit and investment requirements

promotions.title: HKD50 First-time FX Conversion Cashback
promotions.highlight: 💱 Get HKD50 cashback on your first currency exchange
promotions.description: First-time foreign currency exchange customers who convert HKD20,000 or above in a single transaction to one of 10 designated popular currencies can enjoy HKD50 cash rebate.
promotions.quota: New FX customers only, first transaction only

promotions.title: $0 Fund Subscription and Switching Fee
promotions.highlight: 💼 Unlimited $0 subscription and switching fees for all funds
promotions.description: WeLab Bank consistently offers unlimited $0 subscription and switching fees for all investment funds. This allows customers to flexibly allocate funds, build a diversified passive income stream, and make investing simple and stress-free.

promotions.title: Digital Wealth Advisory Service
promotions.highlight: 🤖 AI-powered investment advisory service
promotions.description: WeLab Bank partners with Allianz Global Investors to provide Digital Wealth Advisory services. The system helps customers set investment goals and provides portfolio recommendations based on individual circumstances and preferences.

promotions.title: Trip.com Discount with WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Save up to HKD500 on Trip.com bookings
promotions.description: Book flights and hotels on Trip.com using the WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card and enjoy discounts of up to HKD500. Simply log in as a Trip.com member via their website or mobile app, and enter the designated promo code during checkout.

promotions.title: WeLab Bank Personal Loan R Friends Referral Program
promotions.highlight: 💰 Get up to HKD23,888 cash rebate on personal loans
promotions.description: Customers who successfully apply for a WeLab Bank personal loan with an approved loan amount of HKD150,001 or above and a repayment period of 24 months or more, and draw down the loan within 7 days of approval, can enjoy a cash rebate of up to HKD23,888.
promotions.cost: Minimum loan amount HKD150,001, minimum 24-month repayment period

promotions.title: Tesla Unsecured Loan Referral Reward
promotions.highlight: 🚗 Earn HKD800 for referring friends to Tesla Unsecured Loan
promotions.description: Besides WeLab Bank personal loans, customers can also earn HKD800 cash reward for successfully referring friends to apply for a Tesla Unsecured Loan.

promotions.title: 0.1% Monthly Fund Platform Fee
promotions.highlight: 💼 Low 0.1% monthly fee instead of traditional subscription fees
promotions.description: WeLab Bank charges a uniform monthly fee of 0.1% based on the total value of selected funds, helping customers save nearly 85% in transaction fees compared to traditional subscription fee models. This allows for unlimited trading and portfolio adjustments.
promotions.cost: 0.1% monthly platform fee based on fund value

promotions.title: 0% Fund Subscription Fee Offer
promotions.highlight: 🔄 0% fund subscription fee and redemption fee waivers for all funds
promotions.description: ZA Bank users who have activated investment fund trading services can enjoy 0% fund subscription fee offer and redemption fee waivers for all funds. This promotion helps investors maximize their investments by eliminating subscription and redemption fees.
promotions.quota: All retail banking users who have activated ZA Bank fund trading services

promotions.title: Customer Referral Program - Referrer Rewards
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to HKD 90,000 in rewards by referring friends
promotions.description: Referrers can earn up to HKD 90,000 through this multi-tiered referral program. Top 20 referrers in each of the 9 phases can earn up to HKD 10,000, with additional rewards for each successful referral who meets deposit conditions.
promotions.quota: Rewards vary based on referral performance and ranking

promotions.title: New Customer Welcome Reward and StockBack Bonus
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Receive HKD 2,026 in rewards and 2.5% stock rebates for new customers
promotions.description: New customers who open a ZA Bank savings account using a referral code can receive rewards worth HKD 2,026 and enjoy 2.5% stock rebates through the StockBack x ZA Card program. The StockBack benefit gives higher rebates to new users during their first 30 days.

promotions.title: 20% p.a. HKD Time Deposit for Meeting Deposit Requirement
promotions.highlight: 💹 Enjoy 20% p.a. interest rate on 7-day HKD time deposit up to HKD 20,000
promotions.description: New customers who meet the deposit requirement (depositing at least HKD 1,000 from an external account within 14 days of account opening) can receive a +19.9% p.a. new funds time deposit booster coupon for a 7-day HKD time deposit up to HKD 20,000.
promotions.quota: New customers who meet deposit requirements
promotions.cost: Minimum deposit of HKD 1,000 from external account

promotions.title: StockBack x ZA Card Reward Program
promotions.highlight: 📈 Earn 1% stock rebates on eligible ZA Card spending
promotions.description: Customers can earn stock rebates equal to 1% of transaction value by using their ZA Card for eligible transactions of at least HKD 10. After each eligible transaction, customers can choose one stock from six displayed options to receive as their rebate.
promotions.cost: Minimum spend of HKD 10 per transaction

promotions.title: Fund Position Rebate Vouchers for New Customers
promotions.highlight: 🧾 Receive HKD 800 in fund position rebate vouchers
promotions.description: New customers can receive fund position rebate vouchers worth HKD 800 (including one HKD 780 voucher and one HKD 20 voucher). These vouchers are valid for 30 days after receipt and can be used to offset fund investment costs.
promotions.quota: New customers who open accounts with referral codes

promotions.title: Currency Exchange Discount Voucher
promotions.highlight: 💱 Receive HKD 126 currency exchange discount voucher
promotions.description: New customers can receive a HKD 126 currency exchange discount voucher valid for 30 days after receipt. This voucher can be used to reduce the cost of currency exchange transactions within ZA Bank.
promotions.quota: New customers who open accounts with referral codes

promotions.title: Year-Round Travel Offers
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Exclusive travel discounts and benefits year-round
promotions.description: ZA Bank provides ongoing travel offers and benefits for its customers. These appear to be permanent travel-related benefits available to ZA Bank customers, potentially including discounts on flights, hotels, and other travel services.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Hold 11 different currencies in one account
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers a multi-currency savings account allowing customers to hold 11 different currencies, including HKD, CNY, USD, GBP, SGD, EUR, CAD, AUD, JPY, NZD, and CHF. Customers can exchange currencies 24x7 at their preferred rates.

promotions.title: Free Cash Withdrawals at Visa ATMs
promotions.highlight: 💳 Withdraw cash for free at over 3,000 Visa ATMs across Hong Kong
promotions.description: ZA Bank customers can withdraw cash for free at over 3,000 Visa ATMs across Hong Kong using their ZA Card. This is a permanent feature of the ZA Card with no specified end date.

promotions.title: New Crypto Customer Fee Waiver
promotions.highlight: 🪙 $0 platform fee for crypto trading for first 90 days
promotions.description: New customers can enjoy $0 platform fee for cryptocurrency trading for the first 90 days after opening their account. This allows new users to trade crypto 24/7 directly with HKD or USD deposits without platform fees.
promotions.quota: New customers only, for first 90 days after account opening

promotions.title: Custom Card Number Selection
promotions.highlight: 🔢 Choose the last 6 digits on your ZA Card
promotions.description: ZA Bank is the first bank in Hong Kong to allow customers to choose the last 6 digits on their card face. This personalization feature gives customers a unique opportunity to customize their debit card with personally meaningful numbers.

promotions.title: No Annual Fee ZA Card
promotions.highlight: 💰 No annual or hidden fees on the ZA Visa debit card
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers a Visa debit card with no annual or hidden fees. The card supports Apple Pay and Google Pay, providing a cost-effective payment solution for customers without the recurring fees typical of many payment cards.

promotions.title: Free Instant FPS Transfers
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Free and instant transfers via FPS
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers free instant transfers via Hong Kong's Faster Payment System (FPS). Customers can send and receive money instantly without fees, including receiving HKD and CNY using just a mobile phone number.

promotions.title: Zero Fee SWIFT Transfers
promotions.highlight: 🌍 Transfer money to 140+ countries with zero ZA Bank fee
promotions.description: ZA Bank customers can make international transfers to over 140 countries and regions via SWIFT with zero fees charged by ZA Bank. This service allows for global money transfers without the typical sending bank fees.
promotions.cost: Free from ZA Bank side (recipient bank may charge fees)

promotions.title: 24/7 Banking Services
promotions.highlight: 🕒 Access banking services 24/7 without time restrictions
promotions.description: ZA Bank provides 24/7 banking services, allowing customers to access their accounts and conduct transactions at any time of day or night. This includes 24/7 customer service support for assistance whenever needed.

promotions.title: Zero Fee Stock Trading
promotions.highlight: 📊 Trade stocks with 0 brokerage and 0 custody fees
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers stock trading with zero brokerage fees, zero custody fees, and platform fees as low as USD 1.99/HKD 18 per transaction. This makes stock investing more accessible by reducing the costs typically associated with trading.
promotions.quota: All ZA Bank investment account holders
promotions.cost: Platform fee as low as USD 1.99/HKD 18 per transaction
